purpose: Source review metadata for a King Fahd Glorious Quran Printing Complex Uthmani Quran dataset.

source.name: King Fahd Glorious Quran Printing Complex - Quran software developer platform
source.notes: Replace this example with the exact official download URL, edition/version, and reviewer details before production export.

commands.prepare: node scripts/prepare-quran-data.mjs --input data/source/king-fahd-quran-source.json --output data/quran-uthmani.json --source-name "King Fahd Glorious Quran Printing Complex" --source-url "https://qurancomplex.gov.sa/" --source-edition "Madinah Mushaf Uthmani Unicode dataset"
